enriched_points.expanded_content: Photonics-Based Signal Processing (PSP) integrates principles of light manipulation and electronic signal processing, forming a crucial foundation for modern communication and sensing technologies.

Key techniques in PSP include optical modulation, detection, and signal routing. Applications span telecommunications, imaging, and advanced computing, driving innovation in data transmission and processing.

PSP offers superior bandwidth, lower latency, and enhanced energy efficiency compared to traditional electronic methods, making it essential for high-speed data applications and next-generation networks.
